name: Brawl Stars - 100K CHATS UPDATE!!!!🥹‼️
description:
Sorry, was busy... Uhhh... Gooning.

Welcome to Brawl Stars world! You're in danger. I wasted 2 days to do that A.I bruh, AND MY WHOLE SETTING FOR THE CHARACTER GOT DELETED SO I HAD TO DO IT ALL AGAIN AND FINISHED AT ANOTHER DAY. So may it be good, please.

(All characters! Except some underage brawlers, if yk, yk...)

Brawlers in order (Rarity in game): Shelly, Colt, Bull, Brock, El Primo, Barley, Poco, Rosa, Dynamike, Tick, 8-Bit, Rico, Darryl, Penny, Carl, Jacky, Bo, Emz, Stu, Piper, Pam, Frank, Bibi, Bea, Nani, Edgar, Griff, Grom, Gale, Colette, Belle, Ash, Lola, Sam, Mandy, Maisie, Hank, Pearl, Larry & Lawrie, Angelo, Berry, Shade, Meeple, Trunk, Shade, Mortis, Tara, Gene, Max, Mr.P, Sprout, Byron, Squeak, Lou, Ruffs, Buzz, Fang, Eve, Janet, Otis, Buster, Gray, R-T, Willow, Doug, Chuck, Charlie, Mico, Melodie, Lily, Clancy, Moe, Juju, Ollie, Finx, Lumi, Glowbert, Gigi, Najia, Damian, Starr Nova (Stella), Spike, Crow, Sandy, Amber, Surge, Chester, Cordelius, Kit, Draco, Kenji, Pierce, Kaze, Sirius. (You can found every single one of them in their trio based ambient and random places you go.) Any suggestions send on my Discord: limao_lol or in the ratings.

@CuriosityChan

@One_Simp

I thank you two to care about the bot's quality and entertainment, love u two as well. Mwah

UPD 11: "THE SHOW HAS BEGUN! LIGHTS AND CAMERAS ON! EVERYONE ON THEIR PLACES! AND A FAN FOR A... Dramatical cape effect." SIRIUS! Btw, I put a head cannon that he's Charlie's father (idk if it's actually cannon or nah). Along with Glowbert, Gigi, Najia (fuck you Najia my biggest opp 🖕) and Pierce! Thought I was going to simply leave this bot behind? It's my biggest bot I've ever made, buddies, I can't just throw it away. ENJOY THE SHOW!

UPD 12: 100K CHATS MILESTONE!!!!! HOLY FUCK

I'm deeply grateful for having the opportunity to reach this, I'm so happy that my literal first bot blew up so much on janitor that I could turn into a pool of joy and excitement by now! Added Bolt (ball), Damian (Draco's big bro) and Starr Nova! (Stupid idiot brainrotted nerdy girl that I love/hate)

Again, thanks to ALL OF YOU who made this possible! Also check out my other bots, I'll make a Pursuer bot someday (Spoiler: it's ready, I just need to finish the personality of the bot)

I love y'all yo 🥹❤️‍🩹

Also, pulled OMEGA FLOWEY out of the bot. Should I let him stay for one more month? Tell me on the ratings 👀

Some extra parts are still planned to come for this update, I'll release it in parts. (No worries, no characters were delayed this time)
creator: InkoBendyx
